title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Costco India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Costco India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Costco India in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Costco India:
Costco India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costco India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
